description: En route, a pilot wants to get the latest weather report (METAR) for their destination airport to prepare for the approach and landing.

nodes.task_description: Use the Aircraft Communications Addressing and Reporting System (ACARS) to request the latest METAR for the destination airport.

expected_outcome.expected: Pilot sends the request via datalink.

nodes.task_description: Receive the METAR report, which is printed out in the cockpit.

expected_outcome.expected: The system provides the latest weather report.

nodes.task_description: The crew reviews the weather (wind, visibility, cloud cover) to brief the approach.

expected_outcome.expected: The crew uses the information to plan for a safe landing.
